title: Emails & Activities is not supported on Mobile for IOS or Andriod
excerpt: Emails & Activities should be supported on Mobile for IOS or Andriod. We have all our Notes there. We can’t use the app if this feature is not supported.

posts.author: Kmadrigal (Kmadrigal)
posts.cookedHtml: Emails & Activities should be supported on Mobile for IOS or Andriod. We have all our Notes there. We can’t use the app if this feature is not supported.

posts.author: Julietteb (Juliette )
posts.cookedHtml: Hey! We released our email and activities function for mobile for our sales CRM. Check it out and if you have any questions or start a discussion in our sales CRM category.
